sub_fields.label: Featured events
sub_fields.name: featured_events
sub_fields.instructions: Select events to be featured. Events in the past will be automatically replaced by more recent events.

sub_fields.label: First block image alignment
sub_fields.name: image_alignment
sub_fields.instructions: Select how the image for the first block should be aligned

sub_fields.label: Add link
sub_fields.name: add_link
sub_fields.message: Check if you want to add a link

sub_fields.label: Add email
sub_fields.name: add_email
sub_fields.message: Check if you want to link an email address

sub_fields.label: Add file
sub_fields.name: add_file
sub_fields.message: Check if you want to add a file

sub_fields.label: Show times and admission
sub_fields.name: show_times_and_admission
sub_fields.instructions: Times and admission details are pulled from Shoemakers Options

sub_fields.label: Fixed page links
sub_fields.name: fixed_page_links
sub_fields.instructions: Select which page links to display

sub_fields.label: Video banner
sub_fields.name: video_banner
sub_fields.message: Check if you want a video banner

sub_fields.label: Add separator
sub_fields.name: add_separator
sub_fields.message: Check if you want to add a separator

sub_fields.label: ID link
sub_fields.name: link_to
sub_fields.instructions: Enter id of the section the link will jump to

sub_fields.label: Invert layout
sub_fields.name: invert_layout
sub_fields.message: Check if you want to display text on the left

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Defaults to the global setting in the Shoemakers Options

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Defaults to the global setting in the Shoemakers Options
